journal.name: Journal of Neurotrauma
journal.notes: Strong home for TBI mechanism, biomarker, and translational synthesis if the evidence chain is explicit and bounded.

reasons: Audience overlap: Biomarker, Mechanism, Neurotrauma
Manuscript mode fit: Endotype Discriminator, Mechanistic Biomarker
Article-type overlap: original research, review
Family fit: journal often suits this manuscript family.

Official Journal of Neurotrauma author instructions are currently behind a Cloudflare-protected submission portal from this environment. Keep this journal as shortlist-only until the instructions are captured manually or from a session that can access the publisher portal.

journal.name: Frontiers in Neurology
journal.notes: Broad neurological venue that is sometimes useful when the story is mechanistic and cross-cutting rather than strictly critical-care focused.

reasons: Audience overlap: Biomarker, Neurotrauma
Manuscript mode fit: Endotype Discriminator, Mechanistic Biomarker
Article-type overlap: hypothesis and theory, original research
Family fit: journal often suits this manuscript family.
Article type is compatible with the captured journal requirements.
Current evidence chain meets the journal requirements snapshot.
Bounded translation still conflicts with this journal requirements snapshot.
Scientific strength is still below the minimum threshold recorded for this journal.

snapshot.notes: Official Frontiers pages show Original Research, Systematic Review/Review, Hypothesis and Theory, and Brief Research Report as accepted article types for this journal family. The author-guidelines page points authors to the article-type word-count limits and recommends full section structure for Original Research. Operational fit rule: keep bounded translation below primary-target readiness.

journal.name: Neurocritical Care
journal.notes: High-fit specialty venue for neurocritical and acute-severity framing, especially when readouts and translational logic are explicit.

snapshot.notes: Official Springer instructions (updated February 2025) list Original work, Brief communication, Review article, Viewpoint, Editorial, Ethical Matters, Take a closer look at trials, Take Notice: Technology, Neuro-Images, Letters, Invited commentary, and Special article. Original work requires a structured abstract and full Methods/Results/Discussion structure. Operational fit rule: keep bounded translation below primary-target readiness.
